name: A664VLConfig
title: A664VLConfig
syntax: long A664VLConfig (a664Frame aFrame, dword RxFlags, dword TxFlags, dword BagValue, dword MaxFrameSize, dword SkewMax) (1)
description: Configure a Virtual-Link for a given a664Frame or a664Message.

parameters.name: RxFlags
parameters.description: control integrity checking (IntChk: bit position 0) and redundancy management (RMA: bit position 1)
